prompt: Create a Venn diagram comparing students, workers, and entrepreneurs.
completion:
venn
  set A["Students"]
  set B["Workers"]
  set C["Entrepreneurs"]
  union A,B
    text "Working Students"
  union B,C
    text "Employee Founders"
  union A,B,C
    text "Lifelong Builders"
